thesis_profile.market_mechanism: in the liquid perp-covered core, leader-continuation, carry-dislocation, and contrarian laggard-tilt alphas dominate in different two-dimensional regimes formed by per-timestamp cross-sectional momentum dispersion and cross-sectional median momentum: high-dispersion up regimes favor leaders, high-dispersion down regimes and compressed regimes favor carry-dislocation, and low-dispersion broad-rally or broad-selloff regimes favor a contrarian laggard-tilt that fades over-extended chase
thesis_profile.directional_claim: rank liquid perp-covered names higher by blending three sub-signals (leader-continuation, carry-dislocation, contrarian laggard-tilt) where blend weights are driven by per-timestamp two-dimensional regime classification: dispersion governs leader-vs-carry, and the broad-uniform corner activates the contrarian laggard tilt to fade extended names in regimes where directional ranking has historically failed
thesis_profile.factor_formula: compute three name-level sub-scores (leader-continuation, carry-dislocation, contrarian laggard-tilt) and blend them using a per-timestamp two-dimensional regime weight derived from cross-sectional dispersion of |momentum_20| and cross-sectional median momentum_20: high-dispersion timestamps lean leader/carry by sign of median, low-dispersion broad-uniform timestamps activate the contrarian laggard tilt; apply common quality screens for distress, blow-up volatility, and broken-tape setups
